VotingList.title: VotingList
VotingList.description: A collaborative movie discussion and voting room

title.description: The title of the voting list

description.description: An optional description of the voting list

creatorId.description: The user ID of the creator

creatorName.description: The display name of the creator

creatorEmail.description: The optional email of the creator

releaseTime.description: ISO timestamp for scheduled release countdown

lastReleasedMovieId.description: ID of the last released movie

frozenMovieId.description: ID of the movie frozen as top choice 24 hours before release

MovieSuggestion.title: MovieSuggestion
MovieSuggestion.description: A movie suggested by a participant for voting and debating

description.description: Brief description or overview of the movie

poster.description: URL of the movie poster image

trailerUrl.description: A YouTube search URL or trailer link

suggestedBy.description: The display name of the suggesting user

suggestedById.description: The user ID or session ID of the suggesting user

voterIds.description: User or session IDs of participants who voted for this movie

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User specific preferences and metadata like recently visited rooms

recentRooms.description: List of recently visited room IDs

updatedAt.description: Firestore server timestamp of last update

/lists/{listId}/movies/{movieId}.description: Subcollection of movie recommendations suggested in a room

/lists/{listId}/watched/{movieId}.description: Subcollection of movies that have been watched after release countdown

/users/{userId}.description: User profile containing metadata like recently visited rooms
